name: What's the difference between work injury and occupational illness claim in Utah?
description: Illness gradual vs injury sudden; similar benefits[2].

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between work injury and occupational illness claim in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illness gradual vs injury sudden; similar benefits[2].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Injuries sudden/accidental; illnesses gradual from exposure.

Different proof, timelines; illnesses harder[2].

- Injury: event-based.
- Illness: cumulative.
- Both comp covered.

Know category for filing.
